```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/tasks/__init__.py",
  "3:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import logging\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, Dict, MutableMapping, Optional, Type\r\n \r\n from pydantic import BaseModel\r\n from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n \r\n from ..config import Settings, get_settings\r\n from ..models import Job\r\n \r\n \r\n TaskFunc = Callable[[\"TaskContext\", BaseModel], Awaitable[Any]]\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class TaskDefinition:\r\n     name: str\r\n     payload_model: Type[BaseModel]\r\n     func: TaskFunc\r\n     max_attempts_default: int\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class TaskContext:\r\n     job: Job\r\n     attempt: int\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession]\r\n     settings: Settings\r\n     logger: logging.Logger\r\n     check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]]\r\n \r\n \r\n _TASKS: MutableMapping[str, TaskDefinition] = {}\r\n \r\n \r\n def register_task(\r\n     name: str,\r\n     *,\r\n     payload_model: Type[BaseModel],\r\n     max_attempts_default: int = 3,\r\n ) -> Callable[[TaskFunc], TaskFunc]:\r\n     \"\"\"Decorator to register a task implementation.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     def decorator(func: TaskFunc) -> TaskFunc:\r\n         if name in _TASKS:\r\n             raise ValueError(f\"Task {name!r} already registered\")\r\n         _TASKS[name] = TaskDefinition(\r\n             name=name,\r\n             payload_model=payload_model,\r\n             func=func,\r\n             max_attempts_default=max_attempts_default,\r\n         )\r\n         return func\r\n \r\n     return decorator\r\n \r\n \r\n def get_task_definition(name: str) -> TaskDefinition:\r\n     try:\r\n         return _TASKS[name]\r\n     except KeyError as exc:\r\n         raise KeyError(f\"Unknown task type {name!r}\") from exc\r\n \r\n \r\n def make_context(\r\n     *,\r\n     job: Job,\r\n     attempt: int,\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession],\r\n     logger: logging.Logger,\r\n     check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]],\r\n ) -> TaskContext:\r\n     return TaskContext(\r\n         job=job,\r\n         attempt=attempt,\r\n         session=session,\r\n         settings=get_settings(),\r\n         logger=logger,\r\n         check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n     )\r\n \r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

dataclass\r\nfrom typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, Dict, MutableMapping, Optional, Type\r\n \r\n from pydantic import BaseModel\r\n from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n \r\n from ..config import Settings, get_settings\r\n from ..models import Job\r\n \r\n \r\n TaskFunc = Callable[[\"TaskContext\", BaseModel], Awaitable[Any]]\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class TaskDefinition:\r\n     name: str\r\n     payload_model: Type[BaseModel]\r\n     func: TaskFunc\r\n     max_attempts_default: int\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class TaskContext:\r\n     job: Job\r\n     attempt: int\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession]\r\n     settings: Settings\r\n     logger: logging.Logger\r\n     check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]]\r\n \r\n \r\n _TASKS: MutableMapping[str, TaskDefinition] = {}\r\n \r\n \r\n def register_task(\r\n     name: str,\r\n     *,\r\n     payload_model: Type[BaseModel],\r\n     max_attempts_default: int = 3,\r\n ) -> Callable[[TaskFunc], TaskFunc]:\r\n     \"\"\"Decorator to register a task implementation.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     def decorator(func: TaskFunc) -> TaskFunc:\r\n         if name in _TASKS:\r\n             raise ValueError(f\"Task {name!r} already registered\")\r\n         _TASKS[name] = TaskDefinition(\r\n             name=name,\r\n             payload_model=payload_model,\r\n             func=func,\r\n             max_attempts_default=max_attempts_default,\r\n         )\r\n         return func\r\n \r\n     return decorator\r\n \r\n \r\n def get_task_definition(name: str) -> TaskDefinition:\r\n     try:\r\n         return _TASKS[name]\r\n     except KeyError as exc:\r\n         raise KeyError(f\"Unknown task type {name!r}\") from exc\r\n \r\n \r\n def make_context(\r\n     *,\r\n     job: Job,\r\n     attempt: int,\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession],\r\n     logger: logging.Logger,\r\n     check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]],\r\n ) -> TaskContext:\r\n     return TaskContext(\r\n         job=job,\r\n         attempt=attempt,\r\n         session=session,\r\n         settings=get_settings(),\r\n         logger=logger,\r\n         check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n     )\r\n \r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
